breakdown: This PR stabilizes level-up regressions by replacing the old `_extract_xp_from_player_data` function with `extract_character_xp`, and changes XP synthesis logic to prioritize `xp_awarded` from combat/encounter summaries over legacy fields. Key issues: incomplete removal (test file still tests deleted function), inconsistent isinstance checks between the two synthesized rewards functions, and some code style changes mixed in.
key_changes: Modify _synthesize_generic_rewards_box to check combat_summary.get('xp_awarded') first with isinstance guard
Change XP extraction to prioritize xp_awarded over rewards_pending xp_gained/xp fields
Add ensure_level_up_rewards_pending wrapper replacing check_and_set_level_up_pending_impl calls
Line wrapping changes in multiple functions for readability but mixed with functional changes
